localizations.title: The Flight of the Angel
localizations.hint_1: Do you need help getting started? Carefully read the note attached to the map, then use your gondola (15) to travel to the location in question.
localizations.hint_7: The thick rope between this tower and the palace is a perfect means of infiltration. But first, you'll need to meet with your contact in the crowd (44) to get the equipment you'll need.
localizations.hint_9: This must be the clock holding the plans, but first it must be opened!  According to the note (50), unlocking the diary (60) will provide information that explains how to orient the 3 hands.
localizations.hint_10: You can drug someone with this liquid when the time comes.
localizations.hint_15: This is your means of transportation around Venice. Use the map to locate where you want to go, and travel there using the gondola.
localizations.hint_16: You must infiltrate the Doge's Palace. With the main entrance being monitored, you will have to find another way to get in. This grappling hook will allow you to climb to a higher place.
localizations.hint_23: You must use a long, sturdy object, like a pole, to maintain your balance.
localizations.hint_27: The soloist being expected in the ballroom (27)  is undoubtedly the violin player rehearsing alone in the loggia. After the concert, he will be invited to the Doge's suite. This is precisely where you want to go.
localizations.hint_38_first: This violin player is the one who those in the ballroom (27) are waiting for. After the concert, he will be invited to the Doge's suite. This is precisely where you want to go.
localizations.hint_38: The best thing to do is to take his place at the concert by stealing his violin. Distracted by his playing, he does not notice you. You'll need to find a way to take care of him.
localizations.hint_44_first: Your contact is hiding in this costumed crowd. The note on the map (91) has hints about your contact's identity.
localizations.hint_44: Focus on the red ink smudges on the map's note (91). They cover specific letters providing information about your contact.
localizations.hint_47_first: Using the process of elimination, communicate with the other players about the shapes, colors, and patterns of the various masks. For example, you can find out if you have the same number of masks with blue on them.
localizations.hint_47: The missing mask from the shop has tiny bells.
localizations.hint_48: If you feel capable of taking the soloist's place at the Grand Ball, now is the time to prove it.
localizations.hint_50_first: This note mentions a code in a diary. That code must be hidden on its pages. Focus on the two "O"s in the words "looking" and "look".
localizations.hint_50:
"If you look closely, you will detect it."
That sentence refers to your mask. To reveal the 3-digit code, place the mask correctly on the note, with the eyes over both "O"s.
localizations.hint_57_first: Using the process of elimination, communicate with the other players about the shapes, colors, and patterns of the various masks. For example, you can find out if you have the same number of masks with blue on them.
localizations.hint_57: The missing mask from the shop has tiny bells.
localizations.hint_60_first: The note (50) mentions a code in a diary. That code must be hidden on its pages. Focus on the two "O"s in the words "looking" and "look".
localizations.hint_60:
"If you look closely, you will detect it."
That sentence refers to your mask. To reveal the 3-digit code, place the mask correctly on the note, with the eyes riveted on both "O"s.
localizations.hint_64_first:
1. You have already encountered the guard earlier in the adventure.
2. If you don't know the symbol, don't worry. This animal is on display in various places throughout the adventure.
3. First, you need a light source. All you have to do is project the light onto the floor through the mask in such a way as to precisely illuminate only the circle containing the moon. The beam should be neither too wide nor too narrow.
localizations.hint_64:
1. Spot the astrological sign on the guard's outfit (70).
2. You will find the symbol of Venice on the banner of the map, as well as on the entrance to the Doge's Palace and in St Mark's Square.
3. Use the flashlight on your device and shine it through one eye of the mask, projecting a circle of light onto the floor. By changing the distance between the mask and the floor, you can modify the diameter of the projected circle. Once the beam is placed so it covers the moon exactly, the other eye will reveal a sign.
localizations.hint_66: To move around St Mark's Square while remaining anonymous, you must first find a mask. Look at the map of Venice for a place that could help you accomplish this.
localizations.hint_70: It is too risky to try entering the Doge's Palace through the main entrance. You must find another way to get inside. But first, meet your contact in the crowd (44) to get the equipment you'll need.
localizations.hint_75: Each player should keep track of their assigned color(2). Keep the screen visible to all players the entire time.
localizations.hint_91: This is the map of Venice. Once you choose the location you want to visit, use the gondola (15) to travel there.
localizations.hint_92: This is the map of Venice. Once you choose the location you want to visit, use the gondola (15) to travel there.
localizations.hint_93: This is the map of Venice. Once you choose the location you want to visit, use the gondola (15) to travel there.
localizations.hint_99: You will need to use your mask several times during this adventure. You will often need to place it on top of other cards to reveal certain elements. If you haven't done so already, place it on the view of St Mark's Square (66).
localizations.answer_hint_1: You must go to St Mark's Square to meet your contact. Travel to that location (+51) by gondola (15).
localizations.answer_hint_16: To access the loggia of the Doge's Palace, you must use the tightrope connecting it to the bell tower. Use the grappling hook (16) to get to the top of the bell tower.
localizations.answer_hint_23: Use the rowing oar of the gondola (15) to maintain your balance while on the tightrope (23).
localizations.answer_hint_38: Sneak up behind the violinist (38) and use the chloroform (10) to render him unconscious.
localizations.answer_hint_44: The ink smudges on the note cover the letters S, W, A, and N. Select the person whose disguise represents a swan.
localizations.answer_hint_47:
The missing mask is the one with 3 tiny bells and a green and orange headdress.
Select it in the app and press "OK."
localizations.answer_hint_48: Go to the Grand Ball (27) with the violin (48) and perform a musical feat to get invited to the Doge's suite.
localizations.answer_hint_50: Place each hole of the mask (99) over the bold "O"s on the note (50). The remaining letters on each side of the text form the words TWO and ONE. There is also an 8 at the bottom of the note. Therefore, the code is 218.
localizations.answer_hint_57:
The missing mask is the one with 3 tiny bells and a green and orange headdress.
Select it in the app and press "OK."
localizations.answer_hint_60: Place each hole of the mask (99) over the bold "O"s on the note (50). The remaining letters on each side of the text form the words TWO and ONE. There is also an 8 at the bottom of the note. Therefore, the code is 218.
localizations.answer_hint_64:
1. The sign worn by the guard is Cancer (the crab).
2. The symbol of Venice is Leo (the lion).
3. Once the circle of light is projected through one eye of the mask and set at the right diameter to cover the moon, the other eye illuminates the sign of Sagittarius (the archer).
Point the hour hand at Cancer, the minute hand at Leo, and the second hand at Sagittarius.
localizations.answer_hint_66: Go to the Mask Palace (+32) using the gondola (15). Once you acquire your mask, overlay it over the edge of St Mark's Square (66) by lining up all 4 edges, and reveal the hidden number.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Once placed over the view of St Mark's Square (66), the mask reveals two numbers at eye level: an 8 and a 2.  (82)
localizations.machine_60: You have found the correct code. You open the diary and swiftly leaf through its pages.
localizations.hint_44_first_2: The SWAN refers to the map of Venice and your mask. You must place one of the holes of the mask over the correct spot, and rotate the rest of the card to reveal something through the other hole.
localizations.hint_44_2: On the central part of the map of Venice (92), locate the gondola hidden under the Rialto bridge, and place one eye of the mask (99) over it. Then rotate the mask, keeping the gondola centered in the first eye. The other eye will reveal certain letters.
localizations.answer_hint_44_2: By correctly following the SWAN's instructions, the second eye of the mask reveals the letters F, O, U, and R.
localizations.machine_9_2/3_Light: A bright light has just turned on. Look for it.
localizations.machine_9_2/3_No_Light: All that remains to do is to project the light through the mask.
localizations.machine_75_ok: "A wonderful performance! The Doge insists on congratulating you personally. Follow me, please. I will take you to his suite. He will join you there shortly."
localizations.machine_75_perfect: "Bravissimo! Such talent and dexterity you have displayed! The Doge is quite pleased, and wishes to congratulate you personally. Follow me, please. I will take you to his suite. He will join you there shortly.
localizations.machine_44_instructions: With whom do you wish to speak?
localizations.machine_44: “With one eye, stare at the Rialto bridge gondola without ever losing sight of it. Then rotate your gaze. The other eye will point you to the hideout.”
localizations.machine_47_intro:
"Very well! Let's split up, and search the shop and the workshop to determine which mask is missing."
The players who stay in the shop take card 57 without revealing it to the other players. Those who visit the workshop look at the device without showing it to the others. You can only communicate orally; gestures are prohibited.
If playing solo, just spot the missing mask.
localizations.machine_47: That's the one! Thanks for your help. As promised, take this mask as a reward. And enjoy the carnival!
localizations.machine_75_instructions_1: Press the buttons when they appear on the screen. There are two types of notes:
localizations.machine_75_instructions_3: NOTCHED Keep your finger pressed until the gauge disappears.
localizations.machine_75_instructions_4:
To perform this piece, each player is encouraged to participate.
Divide the colors among yourselves, then press "NEXT":
localizations.machine_75_fail: “Your performance does not convince the Doge, but he is indulgent and gives you another chance not to ruin his ball.”
localizations.machine_9:
The clock opens!
Inside, you find many jewels and other items of great value, but what interests you the most are the plans of the ship, which you take and hide under your costume. You manage to close the clock just before the Doge enters the room and congratulates you on your excellent musical performance. After observing the appropriate civilities and exchanging compliments, he invites you to the party. You join him, and at the first opportunity you slip away with the plans, using the canals to escape the city.

Congratulations!
